channel.title: Li & Lee model | Katrien Antonio
channel.copyright: © Katrien Antonio 2024, design inspired by the work of Alison Hill

item.title: Assessing the impact of COVID-19 on the IA|BE 2020 mortality projections - a scenario analysis
item.description: In this talk, I presented the strategy followed for a Covid-19 impact analysis on the IA|BE 2020, the mortality projection model developed for the Belgian population.

item.title: The IA|BE 2020 mortality projection for the Belgian population
item.description: In this talk, I presented the methodology used in IA|BE 2020, the mortality projection model developed for the Belgian population.
